# Variant MCP

Variant MCP is the hosted Model Context Protocol integration for Variant, an AI-native presentation editor for HTML/CSS slide decks.

Endpoint: https://mcp.variant.art/mcp

Use HTTP transport. The public repository documents setup and examples; the production server implementation is hosted by Variant and maintained in Variant's internal codebase.

Key docs:

- README.md
- docs/quickstart.md
- docs/authentication.md
- docs/tools.md
- docs/use-cases.md
- docs/troubleshooting.md
- docs/faq.md

Core tools include decks.list, deck.get, deck.create, deck.update, deck.listSlides, slides.batchUpdate, slide.get, slide.edit, slide.preview, asset.upload, deck.export, comments.list, comments.update, brand.context, and brand.update.
